name: Dinosaur Kids' Table Lamp Green - Pillowfort™
description: Bring fun prehistoric figurines to their bedroom lighting with this Dinosaur Table Lamp from Pillowfort™. This ceramic table lamp makes a practical lighting accent. It showcases a sculpted dinosaur-shaped base in a bright green color for a fun themed look. The white drum shade lends a touch of crisp modern style, while the one-way push through switch makes operating the lamp a breeze. Just place it on their bedside, study desk or dresser to illuminate their space.
